# list.arrow
id|int64s|nonnull
tags|list|null<item|int64s|null>

# map.arrow
id|int64s|nonnull
attrs|map_unsorted|null<entries|struct|nonnull<key|utf8|nonnull;value|int32s|null>>

# reference.arrow
name|utf8|nonnull
count|int64s|nonnull
score|float64|null
amount|decimal128_38_9|null
ts|timestamp_us_UTC|null
d|date_day|null
active|bool|nonnull
payload|binary|null
meta|struct|null<key|utf8|nonnull;val|int32s|null>

# scalars.arrow
i8|int8s|nonnull
u32|int32u|null
f32|float32|null
flag|bool|nonnull
price|decimal128_18_2|null
when_ms|timestamp_ms_|null
blob|large_binary|null
